title: Dashboard Page
content:
This file defines the main dashboard page for the DocMed application. ## Purpose The dashboard page serves as the entry point for users after they log in. It provides a welcoming message and indicates that the user's workspace is ready, encouraging them to start improving their documentation. ## Components This page is a React component that renders the following elements: - A main heading 'Dashboard'. - A welcoming subtitle explaining the purpose of DocMed. - A prominent visual element (a large 'D' inside a stylized circle) representing the application's core function. - A message indicating that the workspace is ready and prompting the user to 'Start healing your docs'. ## Usage This component is intended to be the root component for the `/dashboard` route within the application. It is automatically rendered when a user navigates to this URL. ```typescript // app/dashboard/page.tsx export default function DashboardPage() { return (

Dashboard

Welcome to DocMed. Your AI-powered documentation workspace.

D

Your workspace is ready. Start healing your docs.

); } ```
